All of the staff at ABC HealthCare were very helpful, understanding and easy deal with ONCE you got through to them. Polite and helpful doctor

The phone is picked up by British operators quite quickly. Some are quite knowledgable. Overall would be happy to use them when knowing that I’ll have treatments. Ours is through work.

Pretty useless tbh. ABC HealthCare authorised a consultation. Sent me a list of specialists. Went and saw him, then got advisef he wasn't on the list. Called ABC HealthCare and they added him. Then got told they only allowed £40 for a consultation. Called again and got that sorted. Then it didn't go through, so had to call yet again. Then they didn't cover the £200 insoles I required, so I had to pay that. Then they didn't cover the consultation because of the excess. 5 calls to ABC HealthCare and I paid for all of it. Pointless

An 1st Class Healthcare Provider that goes above and beyond expectations.  Thank you from the bottom of my heart.

Immensely frustrating how long it takes to get through (it is a company policy so have a dedicated number and cannot do it via chat or any of the other numbers). This is the same every time we have called over the last 3 months (husband has had the same issue as well with very long waiting times to be answered initially)

Terrible comminications.  I have tried several methods and none work: Telephone.  Impossible to get through. Web site.  Not available due to technical issues Chat line.  Takes long line of questions before communicating with a real person shortly after which the link fails. If you did not have blood pressure before you tried to contact ABC HealthCare you will do after having failed several times.  Baffled by the response from ABC HealthCare. Terrible experience. Told the wrong procedure of how to claim by staff after several phone calls some of which took over 45 mins in a queue finally was told the truth. Complained to ABC HealthCare who investigated and apologized just waiting on compensation that was promised.

Terrible service ! After 2 years my renewal came through having increased . Shopped around and got like for like cover with Aviva for £400 less ! Called today to cancel to be told my annual payment has already been taken -3 days before it’s due ! When I enquired why - “ because that’s what we do “ when I asked this to be reversed as there were still 2 working days in which they could cancel this - they refused as it takes them 3 weeks . I asked why on earth it takes 3 weeks and was told to “ mind my tone “ !! So in this day and age it’s ok for organisations to be illogical and robotic but not ok if as an average human being you show disbelief !  Originally it was just a financial decision to move provider - but now …..  make sure you stipulate you do not want auto renewal , as they assume you’re ok with this without checking ! Shame on you ABC HealthCare - I expected more !  How have you reached out ABC HealthCare ??

Terrible service unable to speak with anyone at ABC HealthCare Received confirmation for 5 physio sessions. Received letters that they are paid but then physiotherapist has received message from ABC HealthCare that "I" have to pay.  Terrible, absolutely terrible service.  Want to choose a peaceful life as you are paying for it?...Don't go near ABC HealthCare. They are terrible
Terrible. Poor lad was untrained & couldn’t use his computer & his supervisor was on his other line somewhere miles away. I wasn’t allowed to speak to a manger for clarity & gave up after 30minutes

The ABC HealthCare Portal .. is the best thing I have come across in a while. In today’s  times of watching the pennies, not having to wait to get your money back has proved to be a great advantage of my ABC HealthCare cover. Using a ABC HealthCare dentist allows my discount to be applied directly via the portal so I only pay for my part and not the full amount.

Titles: The ABC HealthCare Touch system is great.
Review: The ABC HealthCare Touch system makes it quick and simple to claim. It is easy to use and my claim was approved straight away.  Payment was received within 4 days of submission.

Titles: Great ABC HealthCare team; MHD policy not acceptable
Review: The ABC HealthCare team are great and respond promptly overall. Payment is straight-forward. My issue lies with the policy. There are some fundamental concerns regarding some of the caveats associated with the Medical History Disregarded (MHD) policy, which I am strongly contesting. Paying for the top cover then realising there are substantial caveats to paying for my cancer treatment is not ethical. MHD should be exactly what it purports to be!

The ABC HealthCare website is really easy to use. I received great instructions on how to make a claim, and the ABC HealthCare representative I spoke to on the phone was super friendly and service minded.
The Cromwell Hospital is great and everyone super helpful.  The only bad experience is to have to wait for someone to answer the phone for so long !

Titles: The GP I saw was absolutely fantastic
Review: The GP I saw was absolutely fantastic, spent the time and really helped me.  The reception and booking staff were also great. What became a positive experience started off with the telephone conversation with the ABC HealthCare nurse.  Excellent
The Helpine staff is always very helpful in explaining policies and getting pre-authorisation codes swiftly. The online system is easy to navigate and I am overall satisfied with the service.

Titles: Great Service from a great team
Review: The Triage were very thorough then Jack was even more thorough. He explained everything clearly and then proceeded to show me exactly how to exercise correctly. I have been doing the exercise now for a couple of weeks and although still uncomfortable the whole pain situation is much improved.

The actual care provided is first class. Have used it few times in the past and saves so much time. Very quick getting appointments and the consultants really care about your health. The only reason I’m not giving 5 stars is because I tried to settle my bill a few times and couldn’t get through. I tried to pay at the hospital and was told I couldn’t , which is understandable. I eventually got through and paid the bill but I received a payment reminder in the post which made it sound like I wasn’t paying the bill. I didn’t like that. I had to call up to ensure my payment had been received. Otherwise highly recommended.
The advisor was helpful and explained in details, making it easy for me to answer the process.
The agents I have spoken to recently have been cheerful, helpful, and a pleasure to talk to.  A great improvement on Ten years ago.
The atmosphere and the professional approach and service that I had when visiting the clinic was amazing
The attention to detail and advice I received for my Be Reassured health assessment was excellent. I genuinely felt cared for as-well as receiving excellent advice and support.

Titles: The best insurance company I ever seen
Review: The best insurance company I ever seen

The call centre respondent seemed determined to find reasons why coverage should be denied. I was in the middle of a treatment by an ENT specialist who recommended a further appointment after I  had taken medication to resolve an issue that was impending the treatment for which I had been originally referred. The call-centre handler seemed determined find reasons to deny coverage and kept repeating ‘ you have no symptoms currently’ (true but I was in the middle of treatment) and ‘there is an exclusion in your policy for deafness due to old age’ –(Ok, but I wasn’t claiming for deafness, just for continuation of a treatment for persistent ear infection) This hostile responder seemed determined  to find a way to deny coverage and kept repeating the ‘exclusions’ that she felt she had identified and denying me any air-time to explain what was actually happening. I felt, not only the hostility and desire to deny the claim, but also a complete lack of understanding of the medical situation for which I was being referred. This has been my first negative experience of ABC HealthCare support staff who heretofore have been ready to engage and seemingly well briefed on the conditions they are managing.

Titles: The call was answered within a couple…
Review: The call was answered within a couple of minutes, which made a refreshing change. Which is how it should be really. The call handler was courteous and helpful.
The call, for once was answered promptly.  The call handler was most pleasant and efficient
The claim process is easy and straightforward with the online form, reimbursement occurred rapidly.

Titles: The claim process is overall very easy. However, for each doctor visit a new claim reference is required instead of having one for all procedures.
Review: The claim process is overall very easy and the support team is very helpful. Occasionally I needed the support of the doctor in order to get the treatment authorised.

Titles: The claim was processed in no time at…
Review: The claim was processed in no time at all and without any difficulty

Titles: Do ABC HealthCare trust there consultant
Review: The consultant made a recommendation and ABC HealthCare person on the other end of the phone decided to ignore the recommendation and would not offer any alternative  So why not follow up on your approved consultant
The consultant was excellent The nurses at the Fitzwilliam Hospital were acceptable but not always professional The reception/finance staff at the Fitzwilliam went above and beyond to be helpful
The customer service
The customer service was great and the whole experience was painless. I would thoroughly recommend.
The ease of the electronic claim form, to how quickly I received payment was amazing and greatly appreciated

Titles: The efficiency of the team was…excellent
Review: The efficiency of the team was excellent, so friendly, positive and professional
The experience was good. They help me to navigate on which are the steps I needed to follow.

The experience, once I was able to get through, was excellent, but it took me four attempts to get through to obtain an authorisation code for my treatment' The first had me listening to the irritating music for over an hour, before  I gave up. The second was again over an hour and the third was already announcing a probable hour's delay. I finally rang at 1 minute past 8 in the morning and got straight through. You really need to get this sorted out!
The facilities and staff at the hospital. The ease of booking appointments and availability.

Titles: The first time I telephoned ABC HealthCare for an…
Review: The first time I telephoned ABC HealthCare for an authorisation number it took a ling time to get through and the young man who answered was clearly exhausted. He did help me the best he could. However the second time I rang i was answered quickly and the young man was very helpful. I guess you get very busy sometimes.
The hardest part was getting through on the phone,the rest ran like a Swiss watch.

Titles: The lady who took my call (Lynn I…
Review: The lady who took my call (Lynn I think) was incredibly helpful and couldn't have been more pleasant.

Titles: The length of time it takes to get to…
Review: The length of time it takes to get to speak with someone. This requires urgent attention.

Titles: list of pre-approved doctors dont have availbillty
Review: The list of pre-approved doctors not accepting any referrals. They all to busy for month  I went through at last 35 different ones  but just nothing. Waste of a year worth of premium paid into this, still no response from my complaint , and even the complaints dont answer the phone , I have a CODE now but cant get to see anyone . Im Paying and Going see a NON ABC HealthCare approved doctor today Plenty around who are Available
The medical service is good. My main complaint is that it  often takes a very long time toget an answer from the telephone. And I have been referred too often to another extension.

The most difficult thing about the service is the waiting time when you're trying to get an authorisation code.  But beyond that, these guys are super helpful and the process is very easy.  Pleasure dealing with them.
The most transparent and customer friendly health care service provider I have ever used. Very impressed

Titles: So simple and easy to claim …
Review: The online claim service was very easy to use. I was very impressed that the claim was approved within a few days and then the money credited my account 48 hours later. Claim was submitted Friday and had monies paid by Thursday the following week.   Fantastic dental plan and will continue to use.

Titles: The online claiming process so easy to…
Review: The online claiming process so easy to use and the step to step guide. Then getting the updates via text. Also re payment was veryhassle free quick and

The only point of Private medical in the UK is to avoid waiting. Their numbers will reroute you to Babylon who are not able to support you and will ask you to wait until Monday (if you call on a Sunday). The first and only time since joining in 2021 that I needed you and you failed me ABC HealthCare. The NHS has never failed me in this way. Lesson learned.

Titles: The only problem was the wait time on…
Review: The only problem was the wait time on getting through to an operator.  Everything else was great.

Titles: ABC HealthCare in general is very good
Review: The original contact with ABC HealthCare was not good The wait time to speak to  an operator was over 45mins. Every think after that moved very well, and I am pleased with my procedure and all is well. I hope that the inevitable increase in my monthly subscription next year prohibit me from remaining a member with ABC HealthCare. Kind Regards David Woolman

Titles: The people on the phones who provide…
Review: The people on the phones who provide authorisation codes have always been so kind and helpful. This makes a huge difference especially when there is so much going on. Keep it up!

The person dealing with me was extremely polite and compassionate when discussing my claim and quickly and efficiently resolved a minor issue that had arisen. Overall up to now I am very happy with ABC HealthCare and how they operate.
The person on the telephone was knowledgeable and empathetic and sent everything over immediately. Great to receive authorisation code on my mobile, which I could reference.
The phone staff are always really understanding and find information that you need quickly.

The place in Solihull is nice, staff are nice, doctor was nice. I wish when I phoned through to ABC HealthCare I was advised to bring any medical records with me etc. I didn't think of this though, I made the appointment quickly a day or 2 after I phoned. For ABC HealthCare, I would say immediately implement information to new or existing customers to bring medical docs if applicable as I was personally a bit on the spot trying to remember every bloodtest I had bearing in mind I've had so many tests via NHS so minor gripe really as if I knew this I wouldn't have rushed the booking.  On the plus side I was still referred to a specific area for further investigation so its not as though I wasn't helped.

Titles: The procedure was smooth and hassle…
Review: The procedure was smooth and hassle free. Will recommend

Titles: The process in claiming is simple and I…
Review: The process in claiming is simple and I received the correct payment In less than a week. Don’t regret getting the insurance for one minute.
The process is too complicated, things need to be approved I have to repeat things a lot. Everytime I call I have to go through all these options which is very annoying too.
The process of calling ABC HealthCare to obtain an authorisation code was really easy and the customer service agent was very helpful.

Titles: The process so far has been faultless…
Review: The process so far has been extremely easy and within 2 weeks I have had x rays and mri scans to diagnose my condition. I have been very impressed so far, especially aa I was able to self refer.

Titles: The process was very simple and…
Review: The process was very simple and effective

Titles: Every contact I have had with ABC HealthCare has been difficult and stressful
Review: The question was 'what went wrong this time?', but unfortunately every single contact I have had with ABC HealthCare 'went wrong'.  The latest is that my request for a test was rejected as this is not covered under my T&Cs. In fact the t&cs  confirmed that 'treatment' is not covered but tests are.  Previous contacts have required me to travel miles for a simple blood test (my GP and local hospital provide blood tests at very short notice and are much closer to home), and on other occasions I have had much 'toing and froing' by email or online chat messaging.  In general, I have found the front line customer service staff to be unknowledgable, unhelpful and do not seem to pay attention to the details of requests.  The end result is that I will be cancelling my cover as soon as feasibly possible

Titles: The response to ones call is…
Review: The response to ones call is repetitive, predictable and annoying. I cannot remember ever calling you when you were not "busy" The wait is annoying without the faux apology.  When one reaches a human the service is fine

Titles: The responses I received from my online…
Review: The responses I received from my online requests were prompt, informative and where not applicable fully explained why.

Titles: The service was efficient and friendly
Review: The service was efficient and friendly
The service was efficient but misdiagnosed the issue and I was chard £48 for the benefit
The service was prompt, instructions easy to follow and operative was most courteous
The service was very quick and i had a referral immediately which meant i could book an appointment

Titles: Good, friendly, helpful service, but there is often a wait on hold
Review: The service when you call to authorise treatment is quick, helpful and friendly once you get through. Unfortunately, there can sometimes be a wait to get through which can be frustrating.

Titles: The staff are friendly and helpful and…
Review: The staff are friendly and helpful and my dealings have been sorted out by them. The only not so good thing is the long wait on the phone to get through to someone can range from 20 - 50 minutes!
The staff were amazing, the friendly atmosphere, the doctor actually listened and has sorted an on going problem I haven’t had resolved for 40 years

Titles: The staff were excellent and all my…
Review: The staff were excellent and all my queries were addressed immediately.
The staff were helpful, efficient and cheerful. The service was very professional.
The staff were incredibly kind and informative throughout my appointment. They made me feel safe and secure.

Titles: The staff who answer the phone are very…understanding respectful and polite
Review: The staff who answer the phone are very polite and understanding they check your understanding of what they have done and go through everything also they are very respectful of you and your issues

The staff, medical staff and consultants are all really good people, always there when you need them and  nothing is too much trouble for them.  Good to know we have their support.  We have experience of the Oncology and Cardiology departments.
The support given was excellent and issue resolved very efficiently by Mathew.

Titles: The surgery worked and this made the…
Review: The surgery worked and this made the Spire experience good this time. Still don't know why all patients are made to arrive around noon just to sit waiting for hours without food and drink. I have complained about this before, to no avail.
The team are very helpful

Titles: The team at ABC HealthCare are always so helpful…
Review: The team at ABC HealthCare are always so helpful and supportive when you call to organise and authorise treatments. The follow up communication via text is great. The only constructive point to make would be the time it takes to get through on the telephone. An average wait time is anything between 15mins and 45mins which is costly. I haven't found the online service of much use if I'm honest
The treatment I received was second to none . Was communicated to regularly and the nurses were so pleasant and professional .  London Bridge hospital is a lovely hospital in all aspects .
The usual excellent service from competent advisors

The waiting time to get through to your call centre or online chatline was an hour. And when I did get through the response I got was very unhelpful and at times ignorant. In the end I was referred her manager and then to customer complaints. Even then the decision I got was illogical. But at a time when you are your most vulnerable you get ground down by the whole experience and ultimately accept it but I'm not at all happy. I'm not at all alone in this experience even the consultant I'm seeing complains bitterly about the difficulty of dealing with you. And other customers have experienced the same ridiculous waiting time for the call centre. I was advised by the call centre to reconsider when it comes to renewal. Advice which I'm happy to follow.

The waiting times on the phone are unacceptable, I had to try on 3 different days and each time it was between 20 - 30 minutes. I have been with ABC HealthCare for many years and it's only been in the last 18 months that I have experienced the long wait times. The customer service once through was helpful and not complicated, just a shame about the wait times.

Titles: The whole process is seamless and easy…
Review: The whole process is seamless and easy staff are really helpfull
The whole process is simple, quick and efficient. The ABC HealthCare staff are very helpful, understanding and supportive.
The whole process was easy and straightforward

The worst insurance company! Never trust hire them, they will not support you , you have to pay for the hospital and the will never give you the money back, find a better option, ABC HealthCare take advantage of the people.

There needs to be more clarity on the costs that have been settled by ABC HealthCare, against each of the benefits my package included, so I can understand why I'm being asked to pay for certain things

Titles: They are excellent and so friendly
Review: They are excellent and so friendly, however, it does take ages to get through to someone, I was on for 25 minutes the other week.

They ask you for every claim to first go to a private GP, get a referral to submit a claim or even just talk to them in person. Then when you have a referral they take forever to process your request, then send you a bunch of forms that you have to proceed to take to your NHS GP in person to fill out. We don't pay for private healthcare to be running round delivering paperwork on your behalf and taking up valuable NHS time for people who don't have private care.  When you do get to the NHS GP and drop off the forms they ask you to pay a £63 contribution for doctors time to fill them out, knowing all of this and ABC HealthCare only then covers you for £15 of the £63 it cost.   This is apparently a new process they are implementing but it has been hugely time-consuming and not efficient at all. Not sure what I pay ABC HealthCare for at this point the claim has still not even got to the consultation phase moment, still waiting for NHS to fill out my forms for me to then collect in person and then pay to send back to ABC HealthCare. Once ABC HealthCare then receives the forms they might then approve the consultation... will keep you posted on that   I have submitted a complaint to ABC HealthCare but that is likely to do nothing the biggest thing is probably just changing insurance companies at some point.

Titles: They listened and where very helpful .
Review: They listened and where very helpful in giving me the information I needed to get my treatment as a result of pneumonia.

They theoretically approve the medical appointment, but after they just provide a random list of doctors that you personally have to contact one by one, with month of waiting list, and no support in booking. If you even try to email back to ask, it's a no-response email. How can a private insurance be no response? Just making thing difficult on purpose.
They were clear and concise, directed my correctly according to my policy, one call was all I needed
They were great. Everyone were really helpful and the service was fsntastic
They where very helpful, I turned up a week early but they managed to fit my appointment in which was great.

This company really has shown it's true colours. I have a policy through work and recently found out they do not pay hospital benefit for childbirth which we found shocking. I do not think they understand how much of a major surgery a C-section is. Our previous provider was more than happy to include childbirth. Complaint's Team were nothing but rude. The ABC HealthCare Dental side is also a sham, prioritising private over NHS as per usual. Safe to say we will be looking at returning to the old provider as soon as we can.

Titles: This is- rating for  ABC HealthCare
Review: This is- rating for  ABC HealthCare:  ABC HealthCare  incorrectly stopped my physio which cost me unnecessary physical pain as I missed 3 weeks while they changed their mind. Also, my GYN doctor had just quit taking ABC HealthCare patients, evidently because of the amount of discount ABC HealthCare demands.

Titles: ABC HealthCare Blua tech gremlins locking scheme members out
Review: This review relates specifically to the digital GP service that is sold as part of the policy.  This was fundamental to my decision to take the policy out, because of all the stories post pandemic about NHS GP wait times etc.  Anyway, the new app ABC HealthCare Blua has some gremlin that is stopping lots of people generating a login.  There's no timeline to fix it and while we wait, there's no communication and no ability for group scheme members to access the service.  Rubbish - it's meant to be a time--and-stress-saving product.  The phone menus when you try to work out how to try to talk to someone about this are a nightmare too.

This was my first time using ABC HealthCare and they made the process painless and simple. Once the initial request was sent, an acceptance reply was received the same day with a list of specialist following.  My medical condition which I'd been suffering from for months was resolved successfully within weeks with only my excess being paid and ABC HealthCare insurance covering the rest.

Three words to sum up ABC HealthCare; indifferent, lousy, hopeless. This used to be a ‘good’ company. No more - I have been waiting weeks for contact, I’m actually on the phone to them right now - 46 minutes and still waiting - and I’m a member/client!! Why oh why are they allowed to even exist?

Time again I am being assessed an asked to provide information about my children to show they don't have anything preexisting.  We are now over the 2 year mark but the check is still done to ensure that the issue wasn't happening before the 2 year anniversary.  Also for mental health conditions is 5 years - I have a 12 year old autistic child who I was asked to provide 5 years history to confirm he had no pre existing mental health condition before I could arrange and sort of help?  So it took 5 weeks before I could get an auth number and when I did there aren't any therapists available locally and by locally I mean within 100 miles.  Also the only therapist that would take the booking has a ten month waiting list.  There are plenty of therapists locally just not registered with ABC HealthCare so I have had to go elsewhere to get him some support.

Titles: Time takes to respond to patients is 25
Review: Time takes to respond to patients is longer than 45 minutes. Policy and protocols come first and patient’s needs are neglected. App is difficult to use for elderly. The support is more in tuned with digital age, but patients are usually elderly.

Today I had Samual for earwax removal. He was excellent. He explained exactly what he was doing, showed me pictures before and after (never had that before anywhere) and patiently answered all my questions

Titles: GP appointments can only be made via an App (unless you pay!)
Review: Today I have tried very hard to make a virtual GP appointment which is included on the policy that I'm named on. 3 hours later (having spoken to at least 5 different people plus being passed between 3 people on online chat) I still don't have an appointment.  Apparently the only way to book an appointment is via an App, there is no alternative (unless I'm willing to pay which is what I was told in the final phone call!) However, the App isn't giving me the option to book appointments. No one can tell me why. So I've reached a dead-end. Surely there must be another option for people who have a technical issue?!

Took out through my employer and hope to never need to use it. But needed to have knee surgery the whole experience went well. Good customer service and everything explained as to how the policy worked for me. Very happy highly recommend ABC HealthCare

Took so long to get through, then when I did, it was via Chat, because the queue on the phone was so long, I gave up after over an hour. Chat was slow, confusing, repetitive and almost useless. I was told I'd be connected to another department if I clicked on a link, and when I did, it cut me off. I wasted about three hours in total and still didn't manage to get the information I needed.

Titles: Treatment was perfect but all around it…
Review: Treatment was perfect but all around it was very poor. Contacting ABC HealthCare is a hideous experience both before and after the treatment. The paperwork is dreadful with missing and wrong information on it. I’m now trying to pay my excess but that’s turning into a nightmare as well. It’s very frustrating all round
Trying to get an agent on the phone takes a long time the chat service is very long winded, a better telephone service would be an advantage

Trying to get through to them is like trying to get blood out of a stone. Expect to wait a minimum of half an hour to be able to speak to anyone whether by phone or the online chat. This is not a one off, every time I have tried to contact ABC HealthCare I have had this experience. They tell you to try calling back early (makes no difference) or later in the evening (also makes no difference).  Terrible customer experience and a terrible representation of how they value their customers time and health concerns.

Titles: Two months ago I had an accident in…
Review: Two months ago I had an accident in which I hurt my knee. Went to A&E they told me it’s just a tissue injury. But I wan not getting better even after a month. So i decided to use my insurance with ABC HealthCare. And I’m so glad I did that. I called customer service they booked me with the phone consultation with the Dr. he was very quick to understand and asked me to see the musculoskeletal specialist, he asked me to get the MRI done. Unfortunately in my MRI it came that I ruptured my acl completely and I have to get the surgery done. The Dr. referred me to the knee surgeon. The whole process went so smoothly. My surgery is done now I’m recovering well. They gave me good amount of physio sessions as well. I’m so glad we are insured with ABC HealthCare.

Unclear process regarding referrals. A simple question that I needed answering sent me down a rabbit hole of online chats and telephone loops before finally speaking with a person and getting the answer in 30 seconds after 15 minutes of chasing and extremely elevated blood pressure.

Titles: Lack of care, attention to detail and efficiency
Review: Unfortunately my experience has been very poor. The process has taken far too long and I have had to pay out of my own pocket for treatment because of admin errors and because I simply had to be treated and couldn't afford to wait any longer. This happened in January and I am still not reimbursed. Every week I spend up to 1.5 hours on the phone to ABC HealthCare to resolve. All my paperwork is up to date and it shouldn't be a difficult case to assist yet it has been so poorly managed. No correspondence from ABC HealthCare and all I do is chase.

Unfortunately our daughter was diagnosed with a scoliosis which has been a very distressing time.  She is due to have an operation very soon and without Emily V and ABC HealthCare I am not sure how we would be coping right now. I have been a ABC HealthCare customer for many years and worked hard to pay my premium and will continue to do so and am so pleased we are covered. Not only covered but looked after by such a wonderful customer team. Emily in my opinion is a credit to the business and I have not stopped recommending ABC HealthCare to people since she has been dealing with our case.
Unprofessional company. Very apologetic and unable to solve payment between hospital and themself . For over 1 year I have chesing for a payment that was not my responsibility.  Very dissapointed...

Unrealistic waiting times to get a pre Authorisation..  I Cannot even use the App as it throws an Error after signing me in.....Currently on hold for 45 mins just to get through to their "Digital Service"..  Definitely not the Service you expect after paying premiums of over £4k per year....might be time to switch!!!

Titles: Felt let down by ABC HealthCare
Review: Up until recently I’ve always had good service from ABC HealthCare However whilst my treatment for a muscle tear was ongoing, ABC HealthCare ignored my physio’s recommendation for 6 further sessions, stating that their experts had remotely decided I should not need 6 more treatments  What’s the point of having money in the pot if you can’t use it when you need it?

Titles: Use ABC HealthCare Health and Dental
Review: Use ABC HealthCare Health and Dental - excellent service and no issues

Used the digital GP service, seemed ok, got a referral for diagnostics. I then phoned ABC HealthCare to ask what to do next, I was told I can use any ABC HealthCare hospital to get blood tests. So, I then phoned a ABC HealthCare hospital to be told they would not do blood tests unless the gp referral letter states exactly what bloods are needed (which my letter does not, it is pretty vague and just says diagnostics). Now having to the back of the nhs queue and wait 2 weeks for a gp appt, then another 1-2 weeks for blood test appt - if i'm lucky. Waste of time!
Very caring and informed staff. Quick and efficient. Huge thank you indeed! Especially Andrea.
Very courteous, professionally dealt with and prompt

Titles: Very difficult to get though on the…
Review: Very difficult to get though on the phone

Very difficult to submit claims online the tech seems temperamental. When you finally do so ABC HealthCare seem incapable of providing a reference number or email confirmation - then the claim gets lost. After frustrating calls/ chat with the ‘help’ they insist I must have been given a reference number! ( I have screenshots to prove each step of the claim process).  Policy wording can be very ambiguous so getting clarification on what is covered is difficult.   The worst is - waiting times to speak to someone or engage in live chat - over an hour on multiple occasions - but most of my experience has come up against woefully inexperienced staff. If you have a choice do not choose ABC HealthCare. The hospitals may be ok - the health insurance is terrible.
Very easy claims process, both fast and efficient.
Very easy to arrange, everyone extremely helpful, efficient and took time to listen as well as explain any matters
Very easy to deal with, always extremely helpful on the telephone, all of my issues have always been dealt with and procedures authorised.

Titles: Very easy to get my upcoming…
Review: Very easy to get my upcoming consultation and operation organised. Paperwork followed very quickly. Very satisfied
Very easy to submit a dental claim and claims are very quick to be processed
Very efficient and empathetic lady helped me withmyclaim
Very efficient and professional.
Very efficient service

Titles: Very fast response and straight to the…
Review: Very fast response and straight to the point. Costumer service excellent,and very easy to access.
Very fast, efficient service. Excellent.

Titles: Very few private providers in my area - practically no support
Review: Very few private providers in my area. I have a "premium" level ABC HealthCare plan through my work, with a dedicated phone line. Even so, they are extremely hard or impossible to reach. Their website is useless. They force you to use apps to make appointments. I'm on the second (ABC HealthCare Blua) app now and you have to go through hoops and a grueling phone chase with their support to get it to work (had to do the same for the first app, Babylon, too -- why couldn't they just transfer my info from one app to another?). I had much less faff with AXA. I would never choose ABC HealthCare if I had a choice.

Titles: Very friendly and efficient service and…
Review: Very friendly and efficient service and  modern, clean facilities.
Very friendly and polite staff. My My problems were sorted quickly and efficiently.
Very good experience

Titles: Very happy with my ABC HealthCare insurance
Review: Very happy with my ABC HealthCare insurance. Very professional, very quick response time and wonderful support.

Titles: Very hard to get through to speak to…
Review: Very hard to get through to speak to someone - go through a myriad of options, even when you have authorisation there is no fast track to someone  They seem to be inputting new systems - not everyone knows what they are ….  Staff are very good when you finally get through
Very helpful & understanding also a very quick response from very start of my journey with yourselves  Much appreciated

Titles: Very helpful and all straight forward
Review: Very helpful and all straight forward
Very helpful and easy to deal with
Very helpful and efficient. Everything was arranged and confirmed in a very professional manner.
Very helpful and fast response.Excellent customer service skills from the team member called Darren.Impressed with the performance.
Very helpful and polite staff.
Very helpful and thoughtful
Very helpful good explanation quick turnaround. Still recovering.
Very helpful staff make the whole process simple and straightforward. Very efficient service, and managed to get access to treatment within days of my initial enquiry.
Very helpful, full explanation of what’s required and what to expect.

Review: Very impressed with how smooth my request were dealt with.

Titles: Very personal service with clear advice.
Review: Very personal service with clear advice.

Very poor communication. Long lead times and some non response to e-mails….I’m still waiting for a response to an e-mail sent 32 days ago!  Need more staff on answering telephones. I am a Cancer Care ABC HealthCare claimant undergoing an Intensive Chemotherapy regime and on hold for quoted answer times over 60 minutes.

Titles: Very positive response on the phone
Review: Very positive response on the phone
Very professional, courteous and helpful with every aspect, from my surgery through to rehab.
Very prompt and supportive service. I was able to get an appointment quickly following the referral.
Very quick and easy process. ABC HealthCare keeps you updated about the process of your claim. Quick payouts.
Very quick and easy to find a consultant and get an appointment and even did the CT scan that same day.

Titles: Very quick response to questions raised
Review: Very quick response to questions raised
Very quick to deal with claim , thank you

Very quick to do scans and X-ray but over three weeks later still no results. The consultant just told me it will hurt if I run or walk. I will be very annoyed if asked to pay and I don’t receive any written diagnosis. I got an invoice today, I have been holding on the phone to ABC HealthCare for over 30 minutes now. I would like to know if they think my treatment is over. I have received no treatment

Titles: As you'd expect from Private Healthcare
Review: Very quick using the App to get a doctors appointment and prescription.
Very responsive, professional from start to finish x
Very simple to submit the claim online and I was paid within a couple of days with the invoice mailed to my home address.
Very smooth process, felt reassured and in great hands
Very welcoming reception staff and consultant. Made to feel comfortable. Appointment on time too.

Titles: Waited over 13 years for a phonecall…

Titles: Given advice to use a Chiropractor and then told the next day they are no longer registered with ABC HealthCare
Review: Was advised to contact (make an appointment) with a Chiropractor I used previously (2-years ago), but my authorisation came through after I had my appointment.  This was all discussed with the ABC HealthCare agent as I needed to get an emergency appointment as I was travelling the next day after the appointment.  I paid cash for the appointment and when I spoke to ABC HealthCare straight afterwards to seek advice on making the claim then I was informed the Chiropractor I used 2-years ago was no longer registered with ABC HealthCare and I would need to foot the bill.  Terrible service.  Had I known this then I wouldn’t have bothered with the different phone calls to ABC HealthCare asking for help.

Was easy to book and the staff were very helpful - the therapist I spoke to on the phone was good and explained the options.  The only minor downside had been when I first phoned that one of the automated lines didn’t recognise my answers and cut me off rather than transferring me to a person.  However since then I’ve been referred to a face to face physio and he’s been very good.
Was super easy to use the app to help get information and in this case a referral to get the help i needed

Waste of time and money. My local NHS won’t share my details with them so I can’t act on any of my referrals. No pharmacies accept the prescription RX service, they just look at me like I’m a junkie. All in all it just makes an already Kafkaesque healthcare system even more frustrating to navigate.

Well thanks for asking but my experience was poor had to keep ringing got messed around took forever to get sorted . The follow up was a call saying everything fine and I could you back or the call was enough 😡 after this 2 cysit  left and managed to get these remove by Nhs quicker  .  So not good

Titles: Customer loyalty seems to count for nothing
Review: We’ve been with ABC HealthCare Global for over 20 years but are now transitioning back to UK, with my wife & son heading back first. Recognizing that ABC HealthCare UK & ABC HealthCare Global are separate companies, I’ve spoken to the call centre and emailed all the relevant information, but the UK sales team have done absolutely nothing, ignoring my calls & emails. Even if I go down the customer relations contact route, nothing comes back. Net result is that the international policies for my wife & son expired more than 6 weeks ago but am no further forward setting up a policy in the UK. It really feels as though ABC HealthCare have been happy to collect very high international premiums from us but now can’t be bothered to have us as customers in the UK  Update 19 May - appreciate your response Claire, but despite your intervention to get someone to call me, to date, no one from ABC HealthCare UK has reached out...

What a rip off company.  I have singed up with Alstom and when I received refferal to specialist they told me to fill in the form with GP.   GP told me that they will charge me £50 for filling the form that ABC HealthCare requested.  I wasn't aware about any extra charges when I signed up. I Won't continue with ABC HealthCare as I wasted over £250 per year and I have never used them.  Also BE CAREFUL as they will only treat something that wasn't treated before. If you have a record of some iless from your GP they won't help you with that illness.  Here is a message I recieved.  Hello, it's ABC HealthCare. As discussed, so that we can assess eligibility for the treatment requested, please find below the link to the form required to be completed by your GP. (Link for the form). You will need to complete sections A to E. Your healthcare practitioner needs to complete section F. Once fully completed by you and your GP, please return the form to us by email or post as detailed on the form. ABC HealthCare does not contribute to any charges your GP may request for the completion of this form. Once completed and returned we will contact you via SMS to confirm receipt. If anything changes or you need something else, please get in touch via ...(website) or on 0800 169 0045, we're here Monday to Friday from 8am to 8pm and Saturdays 8am to 4pm. Thank you.

Titles: When I could not get a procedure code…
Review: When I could not get a procedure code from the hospital due to them not answering my call, I rang ABC HealthCare to see if they could help. Right away the receptionist called the secretary of my consultant and while I was on the phone she managed to acquire the number.

Titles: When I first phoned whilst waiting for…
Review: When I first phoned whilst waiting for my results the lady I spoke to was quite sharp and abrupt. Was told wouldn’t be able to claim anything. Said I would have to start diagnostic tests again if I wanted to be treated by ABC HealthCare. Carried on with NHS treatment as very quick. Got breast cancer diagnosis and my experience with ABC HealthCare was totally different. Sympathetic friendly staff couldn’t help enough. Emailed forms as post too slow as needed them in 3 days to take to hospital when I had surgery. Claims paid out within a week.  Cannot fault the after diagnosis side of things.

Review: When contacting ABC HealthCare, operative was both helpful and patient, as well as explaining the whole process very clearly. All steps went more or less according to this original schedule.

Titles: Invoice renew for 2022/2023, for 2023/2024Is huge ( incorrect)…
Review: When renew some staff are uncooperative  And in efficient in giving the correct quote  I’m in 2021/2022 my bill was £9000 and on 2022/2023 there was a huge increase in the quote to £15000 pounds which I did not have any treatment and at that time the employ was any helpful and still I believe there is a mistake . But I paid it, for this renew year 2023/2024 It goes up to £20000 , and I did abou investigation test and no treatment. Or major . So I’m contacting you , this time spoke with a nice helpful staff , Marta , which she listened and said there might be a mistake  And she will look further into it. So please I need help and correct quote. Kind Regards, Ban Amin

Titles: ABC HealthCare has really made an effort to be customer friendly
Review: When you need medical help its great to work with a compaany who whilst being careful they also treat you as a valued friend. They rapidly identify you and are then aware of your history and can pick up information from a previous call or request.Then with seemingly no problem they give you the approvals you need and confirm them in writing. What has been especially good is they give approvals for repeated medical visits for upto a year.

When you turn 70yrs old, life throws a lot of problems your way! Having ABC HealthCare Health I insurance  provides  peace of mind !!  You know when you make the call to ABC HealthCare, you are assured you will get a very genuine caring representative who will do their upmost get you in the right path of care very QUICKLY!!   Thank God for ABC HealthCare!

Whilst the service was quick, it was not helpful. I spoke to ABC HealthCare recommended physician who thought I had a herniated disc causing the back and leg pain. I was then referred to a doctor, but the only options ABC HealthCare gave me were foot and knee specialists, no back. I took this appointment assuming it was correct, but was told by the doctor that they couldn't do much, ABC HealthCare had made a mistake and I would need to see the correct specialist. Whilst I appreciate the speed that ABC HealthCare organised this in, it is not helpful if I am not provided with the care I require.

Within 2 days after speaking to ABC HealthCare I had Physio appointments booked in and my treatment has been fantastic. I had been trying to book appointments at my local doctors for nearly 2 years but always told I can only make appointments on the day by phone. Always in a queue on the phone and always hundred plus people in front of me in the queue. ABC HealthCare was like winning the lotto.

Titles: Worst customer service ever… they are a…
Review: Worst customer service ever… they are a bunch of con artist trying to not pay. You are causing so much stress!!!!!!!!  12/06  Still waiting…..   Still waiting 16/6  Gotta wait circa 21 days to get my money back. Pretty sure there will be more problems.   Finally spoke to someone helpful called Alex. Circa 1 in 8 helpful staff.   Either way still think ABC HealthCare is a disgrace.   Pretty sure I’ll be back on the phone for an hour a day in 3 weeks trying to get my money back……..

Writing this review for two reasons:  1) An entire month after treatment ended I was charged an excess of £100 for three physio sessions after being led to believe (after several phone calls with ABC HealthCare) there would be no payment required from me. An excess of any sort was not mentioned once.   2) The poor customer service. It is impossible to get hold of ABC HealthCare on a call in a timely fashion, and it is very convoluted.  I had AXA PPP Private Medical Insurance previously and had a much better experience.  ABC HealthCare didn't once tell me about potential costs and excesses. Highly misleading.  I would have done the treatment for free on the NHS had I had known I would be paying for most of it.  EDIT:  I haven't received a private message/email from ABC HealthCare, although they have publicly replied to this review suggesting they have. I will update once they have actually got in touch.
